Amended DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2024 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. MARY ALEXANDER, Esq. of Mary Alexander & Associates, P.C. (tel: 415-433-4440) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. NATHANIEL KELLY, Esq. of Law Offices of Nate Kelly (tel: 415-336-3001) for Defendants (via Zoom videoconference).

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CHARLES VEILLEUX, CHARLES VEILLEUX & ASSOCIATES, AND STEPHEN CLARKE's Amended DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

This action regards plaintiff California lawyers funding a toxic tort class action by defendant lawyers in Canada. Defendants' demurrer to the complaint is overruled. Exhibits A, B, C and D are part of the complaint and indicate that all plaintiffs and defendants are proper parties; discovery can be propounded. This is the pleading stage and the complaint adequately alleges claims for accounting, breach of contract and restitution under California's liberal rules. (See Thomas v. Regents of University of California (2023) 97 Cal.App.5th 587, 605.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
